criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: FIR No.0689/2021, Kulithalai Police Station, Karur District. Sections: U/S.143, 269 of IPC, 1860 and Section 3 of The Epidemic Diseases Act-1897. Brief: Unlawful Assembly, Negligent act to spread infection of disease dangerous of life, Wrongful restraint, Disobeying the regulation order made under the said Act.; FIR No.0691/2021, Kulithalai Police Station, Karur District. Sections: U/S.143, 269 of IPC, 1860 and Section 3 of The Epidemic Diseases Act-1897. Brief: Unlawful Assembly, Negligent act to spread infection of disease dangerous of life, Wrongful restraint, Disobeying the regulation order made.; FIR No.483/2022, Thanthonimalai Police Station, Karur District. Sections: U/S.143, 294(b), 341, 353, 506(2) of IPC, 1860 and Section 3 TN Public Property [Prevention of Damage and Loss] Act, 1992. Brief: Dispute between the rival political parties regarding the participation in the District Counsel Election to elect Vice-President.; FIR No.237/2026, Karur Town Police Station. Sections: U/S.189(2), 281, 288 of BNS, 2023 & Section 127 of the Representation of People Act, 1951 and Section 3(A) of TN Open Places [Prevention of Disfigurement] Act.1959. Brief: Usage of Fireworks in the way to cause danger.; FIR No.238/2026, Karur Town Police Station. Sections: U/S.189(2), 281, 288 of BNS, 2023 & Section 127 of the Representation of People Act, 1951 and Section 3(A) of TN Open Places [Prevention of Disfigurement] Act.1959. Brief: Usage of Fireworks in the way to cause danger.; FIR No.117/2026, Thanthonimalai Police Station, Karur District. Sections: U/S.189(3), 192, 281, 288 of BNS 2023 & Section 127(1) of The Representation of People Act. Brief: Usage of Fireworks in the way to cause danger.

ipc_charges: 1 charges related to Joining or continuing in an unlawful assembly, knowing that it has been commanded to disperse. (BNS Section-189(3))
3 charges related to Punishment for Being member of an unlawful assembly (IPC Section-143)
2 charges related to Negligent act likely to spread infection of disease dangerous to life (IPC Section-269)
1 charges related to Punishment for wrongful restraint (IPC Section-341)
1 charges related to Assault or criminal force to deter public servant from discharge of his duty (IPC Section-353)
3 charges related to Rash driving or riding on a public way. (BNS Section-281)
3 charges related to Negligent conduct with respect to explosive substance. (BNS Section-288)
2 charges related to Being member of an unlawful assembly. (BNS Section-189(2))
1 charges related to Wantonly giving provocation with intent to cause riot (BNS Section-192)

discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹194,490,130, but 5-year family income is only ₹40,620,994. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹153,869,136.
